headline: Assessing Principal Financial Group (PFG) Valuation After Strong Recent Returns And Conflicting Fair Value Estimates
summary: Event context and recent share performance Principal Financial Group (PFG) drew attention after recent price moves, with the stock last closing at $99.74. Investors are weighing this against its reported 1 year total return of 40.24% and 5 year total return of 85.16%. See our latest analysis for Principal Financial Group. The recent 14.63% 1-month share price return, on top of a 40.24% 1-year total shareholder return, points to momentum building as investors reassess Principal Financial...

headline: Principal Financial Group Names Tim Brown as New General Counsel
summary: DES MOINES, Iowa, April 28, 2026--Principal Financial Group® (Nasdaq: PFG) announced today Tim Brown will join the company as executive vice president, general counsel, and secretary, effective June 8, 2026. Brown will lead legal, government relations, and compliance, and serve as corporate secretary to the Principal® Board of Directors.

content.title: Principal Financial Group Names Tim Brown as New General Counsel

headline: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Principal Financial Group, Inc. and Its Subsidiaries
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., April 28, 2026--AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings (Long-Term ICRs) of "aa" (Superior) of Principal Life Insurance Company and Principal National Life Insurance Company. Both are life insurance operating companies of Principal Financial Group, Inc. (PFG) [NASDAQ: PFG] and collectively referred to as Principal.
